calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Schoefield, Esq. 707-426-5300 of Welles Call Clark Bennett & Clawson for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALVIN BLANCO RAMIREZ, JESSICA BLANCO'S Motion To Strike.

Defendants Alvin Ramirez and Jessica Blanco's motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint filed by plaintiff George Higgins is denied. Driving a vehicle while intoxicated with the knowledge that doing so poses a substantial danger to others is sufficient to constitute malice or oppression for purposes of punitive damages liability.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
